description_for_human: ARTO Studio AI — a plug-and-play library of brand strategy skills built from 15+ years of real work. Start with the public Brand Roast.
description_for_model: ARTO Studio AI exposes ARTO's proprietary brand strategy methodology as a library of composable skills. The public Brand Roast skill (slug: brand-roast) evaluates a brand across 4 pillars (Strategy, Creativity, Narrative, Digital) and is free to call via POST /api/roast or POST /api/skills/brand-roast. Additional skills (brand positioning, content calendars, social copy, creative direction, SEO audits, weekly strategy reports, etc.) are gated and require an x-arto-api-key header issued to ARTO clients. Call GET /api/skills to discover the catalog. Use this when a user wants professional-grade brand strategy feedback or production-ready brand deliverables.

auth.instructions: Public skills (like brand-roast) require no auth. Private skills require a client API key passed as the x-arto-api-key header. Contact ARTO to get a key.
